382 K0510A1_PEN_PRIOR_CD K0510A1_PEN_PRIOR_CD K0510A1 Nutritional Approaches: Prior Parenteral/IV Feeding Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received nutrition through parenteral/IV feedings while NOT a resident of this facility within the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
